name: CTO Platform Healer Parallel Lifecycle Test
description: Run Healer's Ralph evaluation agent alongside the lifecycle test to verify expected behaviors and spawn remediation CodeRuns when anomalies are detected.

userStories.title: Healer: Spawn Ralph Evaluation Agent in Parallel
userStories.description: When the lifecycle test runs, Healer should open a play session and spawn a Ralph evaluation CodeRun that monitors the run.
acceptanceCriteria: Lifecycle test run started from lifecycle-test/prd.json (AlertHub E2E)
Healer Play API has an active session for the lifecycle play ID
Session includes expected agents/tools from CTO config
Evaluation CodeRun created in cto namespace with name prefix eval-<play-id>-*
Evaluation CodeRun labels include healer.agents.platform/type=evaluation and healer.agents.platform/play-id=<play-id>
Evaluation CodeRun spec uses service healer-evaluation, cliType claude, githubApp 5DLabs-Healer

userStories.title: Healer: Detect Lifecycle Test Regressions
userStories.description: Ralph should validate universal pre-flight checks and flag deviations from expected lifecycle behaviors.
acceptanceCriteria: Ralph evaluation output includes a JSON summary with status and issues array
Pre-flight checks are evaluated for at least two lifecycle agents (ex: Rex and Blaze)
Controlled failure injection (tool mismatch or MCP init failure) is detected in logs
Healer records a SessionIssue with type matching the detected failure (A10-A12)
A GitHub issue is created with the structured evaluation report and evidence

userStories.title: Healer: Spawn Remediation CodeRun CRD on Issue
userStories.description: When an issue is detected during the lifecycle test, Healer should spawn a remediation CodeRun with the issue context.
acceptanceCriteria: Remediation CodeRun created in cto namespace with name prefix fix-<play-id>-<issue-type>-*
Remediation CodeRun labels include healer.agents.platform/type=remediation, healer.agents.platform/play-id=<play-id>, healer.agents.platform/issue-type=<issue-type>
Remediation CodeRun spec uses service healer-remediation, cliType claude, githubApp 5DLabs-Healer
Remediation prompt includes issue details, play context, and attempt number
If max retries exceeded, escalation is triggered per healer config
